name: Uniform Next Co., Ltd.
summary: Uniform Next Co., Ltd. sells uniforms to chain stores, companies, schools, and individuals customers in Japan. The company offers eating and drinks shop uniforms that include cook coats, white coats, aprons, T-shirts, polo shirts, working clothes, and jinbei products, as well as embroidery on uniforms. It also provides work wear work clothes for construction workers, civil engineering works, electricity, machinery, iron works, transportation, and cleaning, as well as factory and other on-site work clothes; and medical wear, such as examination clothes, casey white coat, scrub, nurse wear, etc. Further, the company offers office clothing that include blouses, shirts, cut saws, vests, skirts, culottes, pants, dresses, accessories, and others. Uniform Next Co., Ltd. offers its products through mail order and visiting sale channels. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Fukui, Japan.
